name: form
title: Form
description: A Svelte form primitive that preserves the upstream tablecn slot and aria contract.

files.content:
<script lang="ts" module>
	import type { Snippet } from "svelte";
	import type { FormFieldError } from "./form-context.js";

	export type FormProps = {
		children?: Snippet;
		errors?: Record<string, FormFieldError>;
	};
</script>

<script lang="ts">
	import { setFormContext } from "./form-context.js";

	let { children, errors = {} }: FormProps = $props();

	setFormContext({
		get errors() {
			return errors;
		}
	});
</script>

{@render children?.()}

<script lang="ts" module>
	import type { Snippet } from "svelte";
	import type { FormFieldError, FormFieldState } from "./form-context.js";

	export type FormFieldProps = {
		name: string;
		error?: FormFieldError;
		children?: Snippet<[FormFieldState]>;
	};
</script>

<script lang="ts">
	import { getFormContext, getFormFieldState, setFormFieldContext } from "./form-context.js";

	let { name, error, children }: FormFieldProps = $props();

	const form = getFormContext();
	const fieldError = $derived(error ?? form?.errors[name]);

	setFormFieldContext({
		get name() {
			return name;
		},
		get error() {
			return fieldError;
		}
	});

	const fieldState = $derived(getFormFieldState("FormField"));
</script>

{@render children?.(fieldState)}
{@render children?.()}

<script lang="ts">
	import type { ComponentProps } from "svelte";
	import { Label } from "$lib/components/ui/label/index.js";
	import { cn } from "$UTILS$.js";
	import { getFormFieldState } from "./form-context.js";

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		...restProps
	}: ComponentProps<typeof Label> = $props();

	const field = $derived(getFormFieldState("FormLabel"));
</script>

<Label
	bind:ref
	data-slot="form-label"
	data-error={field.invalid ? "true" : "false"}
	class={cn("data-[error=true]:text-destructive", className)}
	for={field.formItemId}
	{...restProps}
/>

<script lang="ts" module>
	import type { Snippet } from "svelte";
	import type { FormControlAttributes } from "./form-context.js";

	export type FormControlProps = {
		children?: Snippet<[FormControlAttributes]>;
	};
</script>

<script lang="ts">
	import { getFormFieldState } from "./form-context.js";

	let { children }: FormControlProps = $props();

	const field = $derived(getFormFieldState("FormControl"));
	const describedBy = $derived(
		field.invalid
			? `${field.formDescriptionId} ${field.formMessageId}`
			: field.formDescriptionId
	);
	const controlProps = $derived<FormControlAttributes>({
		"data-slot": "form-control",
		id: field.formItemId,
		"aria-describedby": describedBy,
		"aria-invalid": field.invalid
	});
</script>

{@render children?.(controlProps)}
{@render children?.()}

{#if errorMessage || hasChildren}

{#if errorMessage} {errorMessage} {:else} {@render children?.()} {/if}

{/if}
